title: BindingStability
description: Reusable binding stability descriptor for cross-operator relationship wiring. Embedded in topology and relationship spec fields to declare the stability contract between two bound parties.

bindingType.description: Classifies the binding contract. SnapshotBinding holds state at a point in time; ContinuousBinding maintains a live constraint relationship.

bindingState.description: Current observed state of the binding relationship.

boundAt.description: Timestamp when the SnapshotBinding was established. Required when bindingType is SnapshotBinding.

constraintDeclaration.description: Constraint parameters for a ContinuousBinding. Required when bindingType is ContinuousBinding.

boundaryScope.description: The organizational or infrastructure boundary within which this continuous binding is enforced.

policyScope.description: The policy domain that governs cardinality and constraint evaluation for this binding.

cardinalityFloor.description: Minimum number of bound counterparts required for the binding to be considered Stable.

cardinalityCeiling.description: Maximum number of bound counterparts permitted before the binding is considered Invalid.

selectionStrategy.description: Strategy used to select or rank counterparts within this binding. Applies primarily to ContinuousBinding when multiple candidates are eligible.
